mapper.select: SELECT e.employeeId, e.emp_nm AS empNm, e.deptName, e.position, e.company_id AS companyId, COALESCE(s.salary_id, 0) AS salaryId, COALESCE(s.base_salary, 0) AS baseSalary, COALESCE(s.meal_allowance, 100000) AS mealAllowance, COALESCE(s.transport_allowance, 50000) AS transportAllowance, s.effective_from AS effectiveFrom FROM employee e LEFT JOIN employee_salary s ON s.employee_id = e.employeeId AND s.effective_from = ( SELECT MAX(s2.effective_from) FROM employee_salary s2 WHERE s2.employee_id = e.employeeId ) WHERE e.company_id = #{companyId} AND e.active = 1 ORDER BY e.deptName, e.emp_nm

SELECT salary_id AS salaryId, employee_id AS employeeId, company_id AS companyId, base_salary AS baseSalary, meal_allowance AS mealAllowance, transport_allowance AS transportAllowance, effective_from AS effectiveFrom FROM employee_salary WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY effective_from DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_salary (employee_id, company_id, base_salary, meal_allowance, transport_allowance, effective_from) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{companyId}, #{baseSalary}, #{mealAllowance}, #{transportAllowance}, #{effectiveFrom}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE base_salary = VALUES(base_salary), meal_allowance = VALUES(meal_allowance), transport_allowance = VALUES(transport_allowance)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT ADDDATE(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01'), t4.i*10000 + t3.i*1000 + t2.i*100 + t1.i*10 + t0.i) AS d FROM (SELECT 0 i UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9) t0, (SELECT 0 i UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9) t1, (SELECT 0 i) t2, (SELECT 0 i) t3, (SELECT 0 i) t4 ) v WHERE DATE_FORMAT(d, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND DAYOFWEEK(d) NOT IN (1, 7)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payroll ( employee_id, company_id, year_month, base_salary, meal_allowance, transport_allowance, overtime_pay, total_pay, deduct_pension, deduct_health, deduct_care, deduct_employ, deduct_tax, deduct_local_tax, total_deduct, net_pay, work_days, absence_days, status, note ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{companyId}, #{yearMonth}, #{baseSalary}, #{mealAllowance}, #{transportAllowance}, #{overtimePay}, #{totalPay}, #{deductPension}, #{deductHealth}, #{deductCare}, #{deductEmploy}, #{deductTax}, #{deductLocalTax}, #{totalDeduct}, #{netPay}, #{workDays}, #{absenceDays}, #{status}, #{note} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE base_salary = VALUES(base_salary), meal_allowance = VALUES(meal_allowance), transport_allowance = VALUES(transport_allowance), overtime_pay = VALUES(overtime_pay), total_pay = VALUES(total_pay), deduct_pension = VALUES(deduct_pension), deduct_health = VALUES(deduct_health), deduct_care = VALUES(deduct_care), deduct_employ = VALUES(deduct_employ), deduct_tax = VALUES(deduct_tax), deduct_local_tax = VALUES(deduct_local_tax), total_deduct = VALUES(total_deduct), net_pay = VALUES(net_pay), work_days = VALUES(work_days), absence_days = VALUES(absence_days), note = VALUES(note), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, p.employee_id AS employeeId, p.year_month AS yearMonth, p.payroll_id AS payrollId, p.base_salary AS baseSalary, p.meal_allowance AS mealAllowance, p.transport_allowance AS transportAllowance, p.overtime_pay AS overtimePay, p.total_pay AS totalPay, p.deduct_pension AS deductPension, p.deduct_health AS deductHealth, p.deduct_care AS deductCare, p.deduct_employ AS deductEmploy, p.deduct_tax AS deductTax, p.deduct_local_tax AS deductLocalTax, p.total_deduct AS totalDeduct, p.net_pay AS netPay, p.work_days AS workDays, p.absence_days AS absenceDays, e.emp_nm AS empNm, e.deptName, e.position FROM payroll p JOIN employee e ON e.employeeId = p.employee_id WHERE p.year_month = #{yearMonth} AND p.company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY e.deptName, e.emp_nm

SELECT p.payroll_id AS payrollId, p.employee_id AS employeeId, p.year_month AS yearMonth, p.base_salary AS baseSalary, p.meal_allowance AS mealAllowance, p.transport_allowance AS transportAllowance, p.overtime_pay AS overtimePay, p.total_pay AS totalPay, p.deduct_pension AS deductPension, p.deduct_health AS deductHealth, p.deduct_care AS deductCare, p.deduct_employ AS deductEmploy, p.deduct_tax AS deductTax, p.deduct_local_tax AS deductLocalTax, p.total_deduct AS totalDeduct, p.net_pay AS netPay, p.work_days AS workDays, p.absence_days AS absenceDays, p.status, e.emp_nm AS empNm, e.deptName, e.position FROM payroll p JOIN employee e ON e.employeeId = p.employee_id WHERE p.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND p.company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY p.year_month DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT p.payroll_id AS payrollId, p.employee_id AS employeeId, p.year_month AS yearMonth, p.base_salary AS baseSalary, p.meal_allowance AS mealAllowance, p.transport_allowance AS transportAllowance, p.overtime_pay AS overtimePay, p.total_pay AS totalPay, p.deduct_pension AS deductPension, p.deduct_health AS deductHealth, p.deduct_care AS deductCare, p.deduct_employ AS deductEmploy, p.deduct_tax AS deductTax, p.deduct_local_tax AS deductLocalTax, p.total_deduct AS totalDeduct, p.net_pay AS netPay, p.work_days AS workDays, p.absence_days AS absenceDays, p.status, p.note, e.emp_nm AS empNm, e.deptName, e.position FROM payroll p JOIN employee e ON e.employeeId = p.employee_id WHERE p.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND p.year_month = #{yearMonth} LIMIT 1
